suggestedAction: Review blood pressure urgently, repeat measurement if appropriate, and follow local severe hypertension protocol.
thresholdDescription: Systolic blood pressure >= 160 mmHg or diastolic blood pressure >= 110 mmHg.

suggestedAction: Clarify bleeding timing, amount, pain, fetal movement, and whether urgent review is needed.
thresholdDescription: Keyword match in session note or transcript candidate text.

suggestedAction: Clarify fetal movement pattern, gestational age, and whether escalation is needed.
thresholdDescription: Keyword match for reduced fetal movement in session note or transcript candidate text.

suggestedAction: Review hemoglobin result and local anemia management guidance.
Review fever context, infection symptoms, and relevant investigations.
Review urine protein or glucose result and correlate with symptoms, blood pressure, and labs.
thresholdDescription: Urine protein or glucose is recorded as positive, trace, 1+, 2+, 3+, or 4+.

suggestedAction: Record gestational age before relying on gestation-specific recommendations or exports.
thresholdDescription: No gestational age found in pregnancy episode or structured observations.

suggestedAction: Resolve conflicting gestational age values before finalizing encounter outputs.
thresholdDescription: Pregnancy episode gestational age differs from structured observation by more than 2 weeks.

suggestedAction: Review contradictory wording in the session note before using it as AI context.
thresholdDescription: Basic phrase contradiction in free-text session note.
